evidence: Learned about David's project: Building a general LLM MCP AI firewall to identify prompt injections and agent manipulation.
David prefers Fireflies for its reliable Zoom integration over new apps like Adio.
Approved moving heavy processing to OpenAI's priority queue to improve UX (reduce 10-15 min waits), even if it doubles the cost, prioritizing user experience over cost at growth stage.
Prioritize fixing user behavior tracking (sign-up attribution) over other changes, as understanding the conversion funnel is critical for current sales efforts.
Darwinbox positioned as tier 2/3 HR tech provider used by multinationals in India/Cambodia, now focusing on US market to diversify bets.
